items.claim: Usman's knees have been an issue that has precluded him from shooting as often as he did early in his career.
items.quote: Usman's knees have been an issue that and I think that that has precluded him from shooting as often as he did early in his career

items.claim: Usman is 38 or 39 years old, which makes his performance a bridge too far.
items.quote: I just think at 38 years old, uh, or 39 years old for Usman, I think it's a bit of a bridge too far.

items.claim: Jared Cannonier has struggled against long, rangy strikers who connect at the end of their punches.
items.quote: the type of fighter that we have seen Cananer have problems with lately are those kind of long rangy strikers that can connect at the end of their punches

items.claim: Christian Leroy Duncan has not yet been tested against a fighter with grappling proficiency.
items.quote: we haven't really seen how he can do against somebody who who does have uh some sort of grappling proficiency

items.claim: Chase Hooper missing weight is uncharacteristic for him.
items.quote: that that's doesn't seem like something that would be Yeah. You know, it's not not characteristic of him

items.claim: Chase Hooper may be injured, which could have prevented him from doing the road work necessary to make weight.
items.quote: maybe he's injured, you know, like maybe he can't do the road work because he's taken this fight injured
